note: Initial seed — covers roughly the last 30–60 days for breadth. Daily 24-hour runs start tomorrow.

items.title: Ableton Live 12.4 ships with Link Audio and Push/Move overhaul
items.summary: Public release May 5. Link Audio sync, MIDI mapping for Push, expanded Delay LFO modes, and tighter Move workflow.

items.title: MUTEK Montréal 2026 announces full lineup, Aug 25–30
items.summary: 120 artists from 28 countries, 80+ live AV performances, plus a public installation village in Quartier des Spectacles.

items.title: RNBO turns Ableton Move into a Max-for-Live hardware target
items.summary: RNBO patches now run natively on Move — Ableton's standalone hardware becomes a programmable target for custom devices.

items.title: Doepfer launches a micro series: ADSR, MIDI-to-CV, VCA in tiny HP
items.summary: Compact utilities for dense racks — ADSR, MIDI-to-CV, env-controlled VCA, and buffer in a single ultra-small family.

items.title: Erica Synths Konstrukt-8: a build-it-yourself analog drum machine
items.summary: Eight analog voices, modular patch points, sold as a kit you assemble. Erica leans into hands-on craft.

items.title: Bandcamp Daily: best ambient releases of April 2026
items.summary: Curated April roundup — drone, generative ambient, and field-recording-led work worth an evening listen.

items.title: Bandcamp Daily Essential Releases, May 1
items.summary: Weekly cross-genre picks. New jungle, dub, modular, and experimental gathered in one place.
